## BaseEventsModal.emitBodyClickEvent() method

Emits the event defined in the [BaseEventsModal.bodyClickEvent](./x-components.baseeventsmodal.bodyclickevent.md) event unless the passed event target is the button that opened the modal.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
protected emitBodyClickEvent(event: MouseEvent | FocusEvent): void;
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  event | MouseEvent \| FocusEvent | The event that triggered the close attempt. |

<b>Returns:</b>

void
